headline.text: L3 ML1 was down *5 hours overnight* on a Cavanna piston actuator fault — cleared at 06:20.

per_plant_summary.L1: L1 recovered from a brief power outage at 17:38 that required enrober reheat. Sollich 2 labeling machine wrinkled labels for 30 minutes but cleared by 21:00 with no rework. Sollich 4 kitchen chiller faulted at 12:43 with no resolution by window close.
per_plant_summary.L2: L2 had a busy 24 hours. ML3 lost temper after a power outage at 17:40, restarted by 18:58, then spiked again at 19:31 and cleared by 20:41. ML3 also ran 30 minutes without a printer, placing 55 boxes on hold. ML2 battled cooler rail jams, servo faults, and blade alignment issues through the morning, cleared by 12:11. A power bump at 17:45 required brief reheat. Panning allergen test on macadamia hoppers failed third shift but passed by 00:40.
per_plant_summary.L3: L3 ML1 was down 5 hours overnight (01:06–06:20) on a Cavanna piston actuator fault. Maintenance troubleshot extensively, calling in additional techs. Third shift also started the line before hopper temps reached setpoint, sticking 71 molds; first shift corrected and restarted. Cavanna flow wrap film defect raised at 15:44 continues with extra monitoring. Truffle line missing salt ingredient (item 10002), expected tomorrow.

notes.text: Startup checklist improvement identified: does not specify waiting for hopper and water temp control unit to reach setpoint before production.

resolved.title: Power outage lost enrober temper
resolved.summary: Company-wide power outage at 17:38 lost temper on enrobers, required reheat and re-tempering.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 18:52 — "The line is started back up" (Dakota Adair).

resolved.title: S2 labeling machine wrinkled labels
resolved.summary: Labels came out wrinkled after power outage; maintenance repaired machine, 2 pallets accumulated but processed with no rework.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 21:00 — "labeling machine is already working better" (Elizabeth Hernandez). 2 pallets processed by 22:37, no rework remaining.

resolved.title: ML3 power outage lost temper
resolved.summary: Power shortcut at 17:40 caused line down, lost temper, required reheat.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 18:58 — "The third temper check is 0.4 we will start running again" (Brandon Lance).

resolved.title: ML2 cooler rail 75 jammed, bent
resolved.summary: Rail 75 in cooler bent, causing mold jams at 08:51 and 10:20; maintenance bent rail back.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 11:21 — "line is back up and running" (Alex Mendoza).

resolved.title: ML2 depositor slider A piston servo fault
resolved.summary: Slider A piston faulted at depositor at 10:35, line down.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 10:43 — "Alex made an adjustment and it started running" (Jeffrey Barney).

resolved.title: ML2 flow wrap blade causing slits
resolved.summary: Bars coming out with slits, maintenance shimmed blade.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 12:11 — "Line is back up" (Jeffrey Barney).

resolved.title: ML3 chocolate stuck on aligner
resolved.summary: Chocolate getting stuck on aligner caused line stoppage at 14:26.
resolved.resolution: Cleared by 17:25 — production continued with caramel tank monitoring (Alan Todd).

resolved.title: ML2 demolding belt tracking causing aligner issues
resolved.summary: Demolding belt tracking off, causing double rows at aligner and bars kicked off.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 16:49 — "Line is running again. So far, better alignment with the bars and less kicking out" (Alan Todd).

resolved.title: ML2 power bump, flow wrap reboot
resolved.summary: Power bump at 17:45 caused flow wrap to reboot.

resolved.title: ML3 temper spiked to 1.4
resolved.summary: After power outage, temper spiked to 1.4, line stopped at 19:31 for adjustments and chiller check.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 20:41 — "The temper look better with the adjustments" (ML3 Filler).

resolved.title: ML3 printer failure, 55 boxes missing lot codes
resolved.summary: After power outage, printer stopped working; line ran ~15 minutes before issue identified, 55 boxes on hold for rework.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 20:42 — 1 pallet (55 boxes) placed on hold for missing lot codes (Wilson Amaris Cabrera).

resolved.title: Panning optical sorter allergen test failed
resolved.summary: Allergen test on optical sorter macadamia hoppers failed third shift.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 00:40 — "The allergen test conducted on the optical sorter specifically in the hoppers was satisfactory" (Claudio Tovar).

resolved.title: ML2 twin belt screw came loose
resolved.summary: Screw on twin belt came out of place at 20:59, causing line stop.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 21:11 — "someone either tried to loosen or tighten that belt and forgot to tighten the nuts on the end. It's good now" (Raymond Fleming).

resolved.title: ML1 depositor piston clogged at 00:09
resolved.summary: Depositor piston stopped moving due to clogged ports, plate disassembled for cleaning.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 01:12 — "No issues found is was a dirty pin" (Raoul Lubain).

resolved.title: ML1 Cavanna piston actuator fault, 5 hours down
resolved.summary: Cavanna flow wrap piston actuator stopped moving piston at 01:06, extensive troubleshooting through overnight, additional maintenance called in.

resolved.title: ML1 third shift improper startup, 71 molds stuck
resolved.summary: Third shift started line before hopper and water temp control unit reached setpoints; 71 molds stuck and sent to dishwasher.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 07:13 — first shift stopped production, drained hopper, waited for temps, refilled, performed capture test, and restarted (Grey Boscan).

resolved.title: ML1 HMI alarm at 18:49
resolved.summary: HMI alarm, maintenance and QA notified, line stopped briefly.
resolved.resolution: Cleared at 18:58 — "We started the line back up" (Imperial).

needs_attention.title: S4 kitchen chiller faulted
needs_attention.summary: Chiller faulted at 12:43, maintenance informed, no resolution by window close.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance notified at 12:43, no update by window close.

needs_attention.title: ML3 chiller issue impacting temper
needs_attention.summary: Suspected chiller issue causing temper instability at 20:22, maintenance called.
needs_attention.status: Maintenance called at 20:23, temper adjustments made but chiller issue not explicitly resolved by window close.

needs_attention.title: ML1 Cavanna flow wrap film defect
needs_attention.summary: Flow wrap film has line in middle causing wrappers to come out open; quality requested second EE to monitor defects.
needs_attention.status: Ongoing at window close; extra monitoring in place but defect not resolved. Staffing limited (only 1 EE for lunches).

needs_attention.title: Truffle salt ingredient missing
needs_attention.summary: Salt item 10002 did not arrive afternoon of 29th, expected tomorrow.
needs_attention.status: Missing as of 20:34 on 29th, expected to arrive 30th.
